overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza at night. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, food stalls, tree-lined pedestrian areas, and transitions from a raised plaza down to street level with light traffic.

tall dark building with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Character walks through a nighttime urban plaza with benches and trees, approaching and climbing a wide set of concrete stairs. Holographic billboards glow on the distant skyscraper ahead while the camera follows from third-person perspective.

segments.scene_description: On the upper plaza level, the character walks beneath a massive circular holographic structure displaying bright advertisements. A blue food kiosk appears on the left with a vendor standing by, while futuristic towers rise on both sides of the open walkway.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial walkway passing a distinctive yellow building with bright 'Mix it up' neon advertisements. Moving under a building overhang creates a semi-covered environment, with outdoor seating visible on the left where people sit at tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian promenade with dense canopy

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the commercial strip, the character enters a tree-lined pedestrian promenade where dense foliage creates dappled lighting patterns on the walkway. Other pedestrians stroll through this green space with large trees dominating the center of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level approach with traffic barriers and vehicle road

descending slight ramp toward street level and traffic barriers

agents.ego_description: walking down toward street level, approaching traffic barriers and road

asphalt street with moving vehicles and lane markings

segments.scene_description: The character descends toward street level, passing a massive tree trunk and approaching yellow-black traffic barriers. Vehicles with headlights on are visible driving on the road ahead, transitioning from the pedestrian plaza to the urban street edge with futuristic buildings lining both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that transitions from an open public square into a dense commercial walkway. It begins with the character walking past benches and trees toward a wide set of concrete stairs, with glowing holographic billboards shimmering on a distant skyscraper. As the character ascends to the upper plaza level, the environment opens up beneath a massive circular holographic advertisement and passes a blue food kiosk with a vendor. The scene then shifts toward a commercial corridor, passing a bright yellow building adorned with neon Mix it up signs before moving under a building overhang. Finally, the camera glides past outdoor seating areas where people gather at tables, completing the journey into the heart of the city's commercial district.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a lush, sheltered pedestrian promenade down to the bustling edge of a futuristic urban street. It begins by emerging from a commercial strip into a green space where dense foliage and large trees cast dappled lighting patterns across the walkway. As the character moves forward, the camera follows them past the towering trunks of the central greenery and toward the perimeter of the plaza. The scene then shifts as the character descends toward street level, passing yellow-and-black traffic barriers that mark the boundary of the pedestrian zone. Finally, the view opens up to the urban road, where vehicles with glowing headlights drive past towering futuristic buildings lining the street.
